package rulecoverage

func PositiveGinHandlerExecutesRawSqlInline() string {
    ruleID := "gin_handler_executes_raw_sql_inline"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Handlers that execute literal SQL or repository-unaware raw queries."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
